description: CompositionBlack round neck T-shirt, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, a half buttoned placket, rubber print on the chest, and mock inverted stitch detailing on the sidesFittingRegularWash careMachine wash in warm water with like colours only, using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeUse warm ironThis black t-shirt from spykar  is an essential in your wardrobe. The ever-loved black adds dollops of attitude to your looks, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Wear it with jeans and funky canvas shoes for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
